name: Salsa De Chiles Chipotles
recipeIngredient: 3 medium tomatillos, fresh, husked and washed
3 chiles chipotles in adobo sauce, seeded
2 teaspoons adobo sauce from chiles, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the tomatillos until blackened and soft.
2. Roast the garlic until soft, then peel and chop.
3. Place all ingredients in a blender and puree.
4. If a smokier flavor is desired, add 1-2 teaspoons of adobo sauce from the chiles chipotle.
